name: A_FETCH_SUBSTACK_FEEDS
description: Fetch recent posts from Substack RSS feeds. Returns new posts with full article content extracted.

substack_urls.description: Substack URLs, e.g. https://pub.substack.com or https://pub.substack.com/feed

seen_file.description: Path to JSON file tracking seen post IDs. Defaults to ~/.claude/PAI/USER/FLOWS/substack-seen.json

max_per_feed.description: Max posts per feed to process (default: 5)

items.description: New unseen posts [{url, title, content, author, published, feed_name}]
